summary: The paper proposes combining quantum Darwinism and quantum metrology, using quantum Fisher information to assess the rate of emergence of classical objectivity. It claims to show that in a spin-star model, optimal measurements lead to classicality emerging at an exponential rate. However, the provided text only contains the metadata, abstract, and references; the main body of the article is completely missing.
